issues.detail: The skill does not address error scenarios such as missing audience data or failed launch outcomes.
The skill references a Claude-specific file path, implying a platform assumption.

scenarios.name: Product Hunt launch plan for e-commerce analytics tool
scenarios.rationale: Treatment maps the ORB channel framework, 4-week pre-launch timeline matching the skill's example, and post-launch funnel of rented/borrowed traffic into owned channels with onboarding/comparison/roundup; baseline gives a generic PH playbook without ORB or owned-channel compounding.

scenarios.name: Major feature launch to 5,000 paying customers
scenarios.rationale: Treatment classifies the update as major per the ongoing-launch matrix, runs the three-phase early access → beta → public rollout, and adds feature-specific onboarding emails plus a comparison page; baseline is a single-day blast with no phases or post-launch reinforcement.
